logFileEmailerConfig.emailMessage:
Hello!

Here's a new Smooth Music Log.

To print the log, double click on the attachment to open it in a web browser, then select File & Print.

  • Overnights: 1-4
  • Early Breakfast: 5-6
  • Breakfast: 7-10
  • Mid Mornings: 11-13
  • Afternoons: 14-16
  • Drive: 17-19
  • Sanctuary: 20-22
  • Late Show: 23-24

If you spot any problems with this music log, please contact Chris Chilvers.

Please note - receiving this email doesn't mean the log has been imported into Genesys.

To do that, check here
